title: IoT Business Development Assistant Director
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Drive IoT sales by engaging with company's sales teams and end customers to ensure company are invited to all RFX’s for Global Inbound and regional APAC IoT opportunities.
  • Provide Commercial support for all IoT RFX’s to ensure best chance of success
  • Support the IoT Head to define and execute a clear IoT strategy and become the partner of choice for global and regional businesses in APAC
  • Work to increase the awareness of company’s IoT value proposition with end customers in conjunction with the Marketing team
  • Develop a deep understanding of IoT partner’s products and service offerings and match against the key verticals in the corresponding company markets.
  • Identify and develop strong partnerships with significant influencing partners in the emerging IoT marketplace. Specific focus on IoT solutions in line with the company’s requirements
  • Share business value proposition hypotheses with IoT partners for joint GTM engagements
  • Build and evolve an IoT Partner program to deliver end to end IoT solutions for companies to increase speed to market and drive cost savings and revenue optimization.

Key Qualifications

  • A recognized degree in Marketing, Business, Engineering, Computer Science
  • Strong understanding of the commercial side or Go-To-Market activities of M2M /IoT.
  • Strong understanding of Connected Device Platform (CDP).
  • Proficient literacy on the related technical aspects of Mobile (Virtual) Operator Network and hands-on experience with key elements of the M2M / IoT solution stack of an operator
  • Proven track record in complex solution sales to Operators or Enterprises is a strong advantage
  • 6+ years of experience in Telecommunication or adjacent industries, of which 3+ years are in M2M / IoT
  • 5 years of Partner or Sales Management experience
  • Track record of meeting or exceeding business revenue targets
  • Strong Sales and relationship building skill
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills; able to communicate our value, strategy and proposed solution on client opportunities
  • Experience in working in Asia is strong plus
  • Existing relationships in industry particularly with large MNC’s would be valuable
  • Proven conflict resolution and negotiation skills
  • Self-motivated, independent and a positive attitude
  • Ability to work in an international & multi-cultural environment
  • Customer-oriented personality and good team player, strong work ethic, results-oriented, flexible, patient and adaptable; persuasive and diplomatic


Interested applicants please send your resume to venessagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Venessa Goh Wee Ni

R24124686

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
